course.name: Pat Kay - 30 Day Photography Fundamentals Accelerator
course.description: A 30-day intensive course covering photography fundamentals — exposure triangle, composition, lighting, and post-processing basics.

author.name: Pat Kay
author.title: Photographer & Educator
author.bio: Pat Kay is a professional photographer and educator known for making complex photography concepts accessible to beginners.

modules.title: Week 1: Exposure Triangle
modules.description: Understanding aperture, shutter speed, and ISO

lessons.description: Course introduction and what to expect

lessons.title: Understanding Aperture
lessons.description: How aperture affects exposure and depth of field

lessons.title: Understanding Shutter Speed
lessons.description: How shutter speed affects exposure and motion

lessons.title: Understanding ISO
lessons.description: How ISO affects exposure and noise

lessons.title: Putting It Together: Manual Mode
lessons.description: Combining aperture, shutter speed, and ISO

modules.title: Week 2: Composition Fundamentals
modules.description: Core composition techniques for compelling images
